stem:
Listen carefully to the audio and answer the question.

The principal announced that tomorrow’s assembly would be held indoors because the playground was waterlogged after overnight rain.

Why will the assembly be held indoors?
options: The sound system is being repaired.
The students requested a shorter assembly.
The playground is too wet to use.
The teachers need the auditorium for a meeting.
correct_answer: The playground is too wet to use.

stem:
Listen carefully to the audio and answer the question.

The bakery has sold out of bread for the day.

What are customers most likely to do?
options: Wait for the bread to be baked immediately.
Ask for free bread.
Buy bread from another shop.
Enter the kitchen to make their own bread.

stem:
You will hear an interview with a woman called Anna, a swimming coach.
Choose the correct answer.

Interviewer (BOY): Today I’m talking to Anna, a swimmer. Why swimming, Anna? Anna (GIRL): I learned at school and I was good at it. Interviewer: Did you train a lot? Anna: Yes. I got up at five every morning to go to the pool. Interviewer: Was it difficult? Anna: Yes, I had to train. Interviewer: But you won a prize? Anna: Yes, I won a cup in the national competition. Interviewer: What do you do now? Anna: I’m a coach. I help other people to swim. Interviewer: And you also do long-distance swimming? Anna: Yes, I enjoy it because I can see beautiful new places.

What sport does Anna do?
options: Running
Swimming
Cycling
explanation: She says she learned at school and was good at it.

stem:
Read the text and choose the correct option to complete the paragraph.

TEXT: When Maya finished her degree, she wasn’t sure what to do next. She applied for a few jobs but didn’t receive any replies. _____ getting disappointed, she decided to volunteer at a community centre to gain experience. She enjoyed the work and met many inspiring people, _____ helped her discover what she really wanted to do.
options: Instead of, who
Before, that
Without, which
Despite, where
explanation: ‘Instead of getting disappointed’ shows Maya chose one action in place of another reaction. ‘Who’ is correct because it refers to ‘many inspiring people’.

stem:
Read the sentence and choose the option most similar in meaning.

The committee’s decision was unanimous, leaving no room for disagreement.
options: made after a long debate
agreed on by everyone
announced without explanation
explanation: ‘Unanimous’ means all people were in agreement, so there was no difference of opinion. ‘Agreed on by everyone’ captures this meaning directly.

stem:
Read the text and choose the correct option to complete the paragraph.

TEXT: Last weekend, our class went on a trip to the mountains. We left early in the morning and arrived just _____ noon. The weather was perfect, so we decided to climb one of the smaller hills. _____ reaching the top, we sat down to have lunch and enjoy the view. Everyone took photos before we walked back to the camp.
options: ahead, at
On, around
after, By
before, after
explanation: ‘Around noon’ means close to noon. ‘After reaching the top’ because lunch happened after reaching the top.

stem:
Choose the option to complete the conversation.

Person A: Why is Rahul absent today?
Person B: ____________
options: He was injured while playing football yesterday.
He got injured while playing football yesterday.
He has get injured while playing football yesterday.
He was got injured while playing football yesterday.
correct_answer: He was injured while playing football yesterday.
explanation: ‘He was injured while playing football yesterday’ is grammatically correct and clearly explains the reason.

stem:
Choose the correct option.

After collecting the fee, the office issued the receipt to the student.
options: After collecting, the student was issued with the receipt.
The receipt was issued to the student after the fee was collected.
After the receipt was issued, the fee was collected by the office.
After the fee was collected, the receipt was issued to the student.
correct_answer: The receipt was issued to the student after the fee was collected.
explanation: This option correctly converts both clauses to passive voice while preserving the original sequence of events.

stem:
Choose the correct option.

Lalita told me to make new arrangements after the hall booking got cancelled.
options: I was told to make new arrangements by Lalita after the hall booking got cancelled.
I was told to make new arrangements by Lalita after they cancelled the booking.
New arrangements were to be made by me after the hall booking was cancelled.
I have been told to make new arrangements by Lalita after they cancelled the booking.
correct_answer: New arrangements were to be made by me after the hall booking was cancelled.
explanation: This correctly converts the instruction to passive voice and keeps the cancellation event in passive form.
